title: DEERC 1:14 Fast Brushless RC Car for Adults, Max 46+ mph Off-Road Truck, 2 * 3S Lipo 4WD Waterproof, 7 Lighting Modes High Speed Remote Control, All Terrain Truggy for Snow, Sand & Mud
features: Upgraded Brushless Power – Unleash the speed demon within! The DEERC RC car, armed with a 2847 4000KV brushless motor and dual 3S batteries, rockets past 75+ KMH (46+ MPH), delivering heart-pounding thrills for as long as you can handle.

Built Tough for Impact – With a carbon steel differential and all-metal drivetrain, this beast is engineered to withstand the harshest conditions. Its reinforced chassis and bumper laugh in the face of rough terrain, ensuring unshakable durability.

Masterful Control & Suspension – Conquer every surface with upgraded hydraulic shocks, anti-slip tires, and pinpoint steering precision. The double A-arm suspension lets you soar over jumps and glide through obstacles with confidence and finesse.

Endless Power, Unstoppable Fun – Dual 3S 11.1V 2000mAh Li-ion batteries fuel your adventure for up to 40 minutes of intense action. Stay in control with a battery level indicator and fine-tuned throttle adjustments, so you're always race-ready.

Lights to Lead the Way – Light up the night with seven vibrant, customizable lighting modes. Illuminate your path and steal the show with a dazzling display that pairs eye-catching style with unstoppable off-road power.

Expert Driving Tips for Optimal Performance – This RC car boasts incredible speed, For ultimate control, slow down slightly before turning, then accelerate smoothly after the turn to maximize your driving experience!
description: Product Description Previous page Power&Speed Delivers powerful acceleration and smooth operation for RC racing and tough terrains. Compact&Efficient Reducing wiring and enhancing performance for high-speed RC vehicles. Durability&Stability Absorbs impact, reduces vibrations, and enhances durability for rugged terrains. Smooth&Durable Ensures balanced power, better traction, and lasting performance for RC vehicles. Reliable&Responsive Delivers interference-free control, extended range, and quick response for smooth operation. Next page 1 2847 Motor 2 30A ESC&Receiver 3 Metal HydraulicShock 4 Metal differential 5 2.4GHz
